objective: Probe runtime availability and validate the shared adapter boundary
acceptance_criteria: Both runtimes can consume the same packet shape
Results normalize to the shared schema
Runtime-specific behavior stays behind the adapter boundary
verification_plan: run unit tests for runtime registry, probing, and dispatch normalization
inspect the persisted normalized result and raw refs
constraints: Do not let runtime-specific argv handling leak into state orchestration
Do not require Phase 3 next-action synthesis for manual dispatch
stop_conditions: Pause if a runtime cannot be invoked or does not return machine-parseable output
